title: PurgatorySMP
description:
The Modded Modpack for Purgatory SMP

What is Purgatory?
Purgatory is a Vanilla++ server in which you can join or create a town/village to live in!

It is a 1.20.2 server which uses fabric to expand upon the base game in a vanilla friendly way
body:
not in use
The Official Modpack for Purgatory SMP.
🏝️ Land of the free, 🏝️
🏠 Home of the damned 🏠

Purgatory is Vanilla++ server in which you can join or create a town/village to live in!

This Modpack has been made for the Purgatory SMP Modded Minecraft Server which hosts a fabric 1.20.2 server featuring mods such as Origins (including many added features) as well as other enchantment tweaks to improve the overall gameplay.

Meet The Team

ItsSheepish

Hiya! I'm Roman. I'm a mod developer and the one who's in charge of making sure this modpack all functions properly.






British_Teabag_

Hiya! I'm Tea. I'm the one fixing a lot of server related issues. I'm not all that talkative but don't mind messaging to help out if you have an issue.






Pandemonium

Hiya! I'm Penni. I'm the owner of Purgatory SMP.






ElvishEmbers

Hiya! I'm Elvish. I'm the one who'll most likely help you out whenever you have an issue connecting to the server so shoot all your issues my way.






Purgatory Features (so far :D):

Origins # [ Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) > "Choose an Origin and begin your game with special abilities, some of which help you out, while others hinder you in your gameplay. The different Origins all have a different impact on the vanilla gameplay. If you don't like these at all, you can also pick the "Human" origin while playing with friends on a server." We have added multiple extra origins to make your gameplay more enjoyable including: - [Consulars Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/consulars-origins) - [Even More Origins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/even-more-origins) - [Extra Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-origins) - [Mob Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/moborigins) - [Elemental Alignment](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-elemental-alignment) For those not a fan of how Origins looks, we have also included Alternate Origins GUI: - [Alternate Origin GUI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/altorigingui)
